song_name: Like An Angel Passing Through My Room
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
madonna ~ "like an angel passing through my room" (2000) an iconic though unreleased abba cover
bpm: 114
key: F major
time signature: slighly 6/4 on first part of verses and overall, 4/4


[Verse]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C/E[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
Long awaited darkness falls[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
Casting shadows on the walls[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]
In the twilight hour I am alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]
Sitting near the fireplace[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Dying embers warm my face[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]C/E[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]
In this peaceful solitude[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Gm/F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
All the outside world subdued[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Everything comes back to me again[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Gm/F[/ch]
In the gloom[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]F[/ch]
Like an angel passing through my room[/tab]



[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C/E[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
Half awake and half in dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Seeing long forgotten scenes[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
So the present runs into the past[/tab]
[tab][ch]G7[/ch]
Now and then become entwined[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Playing games within my mind[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C/E[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
Like the embers as they die[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Gm/F[/ch]        [ch]C/E[/ch]
Love was one prolonged good-bye[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]
And it all comes back to me tonight[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm[/ch]
In the gloom[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]F[/ch]
Like an angel passing through my room[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C/E[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]
I close my eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]C/E[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
And my twilight images go by[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C/Bb[/ch]  [ch]Gm/Bb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
All            too soon[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
Like an angel passing through my room[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C/E[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]
[ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]Bb/F[/ch]  [ch]C/E[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Everything comes back to me again[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]Gm/F[/ch]
In the gloom[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/E[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
Like an angel passing through my room[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/E[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]
I     close my eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]C/E[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
And my twilight images go by[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/E[/ch]  [ch]C/Bb[/ch]  [ch]Gm/Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]

[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]            [ch]C/E[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
